# Canon ∩ Webster 1828 — full intersect

**Source:**
- Canon words: [`03-canonical-unique-words.json`](03-canonical-unique-words.json) — 17,593 unique tokens from BoM/D&C/PGP/NT/OT
- 1828 dictionary: `scripts/webster-mcp/data/webster1828.json.gz` (98,828 unique headwords; direct local read, no MCP)
- **Intersect:** **7,538 words** appear in both
**Date:** 2026-05-20
**Provenance:** generated by `research/gospel/1828/.work/intersect_canon_webster.py`

## Scoring rubric

Each canon-∩-1828 word scored by signals that suggest meaning-shift or depth:
- **+2** if 5+ senses across all POS entries; **+1** if 3-4 senses
- **+1** if 2+ entries (e.g. noun-and-verb forms)
- **+3** if 1828 definition contains an archaic marker ("obsolete", "formerly", "anciently")
- **+2** if 3+ theological terms in definitions (3+ scripture/divine/soul/etc.); **+1** if 1-2
- **+1** if classical/philosophical vocabulary (jurisprudence, philosophy, ethics)
- **+1** if total definition length ≥ 800 chars (substantial nuance)
